name: Chocolate Taffies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-to 3-quart pan over medium-low heat, stir together the sweetened condensed milk, unsweetened cocoa powder, and butter until the mixture starts to bubble.
2. Continue stirring until the mixture holds together as a soft mass when pushed against the side of the pan, about 3 to 5 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and let cool enough to touch.
4. With lightly buttered hands, shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
5. Roll each ball in chocolate sprinkles, one or two at a time.
6. Place each candy in a small paper or foil bonbon cup if desired.
7. Serve at room temperature. If making ahead of time, chill in an airtight container up to 1 week; freeze for longer storage.
8. Makes about 3-4 pieces. Per piece: 71 calories (28% from fat); 2.2 grams fat, 24 mg sodium and 6.3 mg cholesterol.
